_meta.rule: Compiled BEFORE the first validation run. A hit = a detected episode for the same channel overlapping [date-3, date+3]. Event names appear here as validation targets only; the ex-ante rule bans them from query terms, which is exactly what makes this test meaningful. Events must fall inside the backfill range (2022-01-01 onward). Entries may be appended pre-registration-style (dated) but never removed.

episodes.name: Russia invades Ukraine (oil-supply shock; tests the energy-security half of the channel)
Galaxy Leader seizure; start of Houthi Red Sea shipping attacks
First US-UK strikes on Houthi targets; peak Red Sea coverage
Iran direct drone/missile strike on Israel
India-Pakistan military exchange (to ceasefire of May 10)
Israel strikes Iran; 12-day war, Hormuz closure fears
US doubles tariffs on India to 50% over Russian-oil purchases
